title: utricularia scandens subsp. schweinfurthii
intro: Utricularia scandens subsp. schweinfurthii, also known as the Schweinfurth's bladderwort, is a type of carnivorous plant belonging to the genus Utricularia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and treat various infections due to its antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Utricularia scandens subsp. schweinfurthii include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, while also exhibiting antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although its use should be strictly under the guidance of a medical professional.
